parameter.name: pollingTime
parameter.label: Polling Time
parameter.description: The polling time for refreshing the device (-1 is disabled)

parameter.name: callbackUrl
parameter.label: Callback URL
parameter.description: Public HTTPS URL that SmartThings uses for event callbacks. Leave empty to use SSE without callback subscriptions; enable pollingTime for polling fallback. When the openHAB Cloud Connector add-on is available, the binding fills this value automatically.

parameter.name: useDynamicThings
parameter.label: Create Things Using Dynamic Capability Discovery
parameter.description: When enabled, the binding will scan available devices and create channels based on their available capabilities. When disabled, only static thing definitions from the resource files are used.
